hero.title: The Operating System
hero.subheadline: FertilityOS is the world's first comprehensive platform built specifically for fertility clinics and reproductive health centers. Manage every step — from patient intake to embryo transfer — in one place.

footer.tagline: The world's first operating system for fertility clinics and reproductive health centers.
footer.taglineBottom: Designed for clinicians. Built for scale. Powered by the cloud.

features.title: Enterprise-grade platform.
features.subtitle: FertilityOS combines the security and scalability of enterprise software with the ease of use that clinical teams actually need.

whiteLabel.title: White-Label Ready
whiteLabel.description: Use your own domain, logo, and brand colors. Patients and staff see your brand, powered by FertilityOS behind the scenes.

hipaa.title: HIPAA Compliant Architecture
hipaa.description: End-to-end encryption, audit logs, role-based access, and Business Associate Agreements (BAA) available on Scale and Enterprise plans.

ivfWorkflows.title: Built for IVF Workflows
ivfWorkflows.description: Designed by a Fertility Specialist. Every workflow, every data field, and every report maps to real clinical practice — not generic healthcare software.

multiRole.title: Multi-Role Team Management
multiRole.description: Doctors, embryologists, nurses, receptionists, and lab technicians each get a tailored interface with the exact permissions they need.

dataSovereignty.title: Data Sovereignty
dataSovereignty.description: Your clinic's data is stored in isolated, encrypted environments. Tenant separation ensures no data leakage between accounts.

alwaysUpdated.title: Always Up-to-Date
alwaysUpdated.description: Cloud-native SaaS means no installations, no updates to manage. New features and regulatory updates are deployed automatically.

modules.title: Every module your clinic needs.
modules.titleHighlight: Pay only for what you use.
modules.subtitle: FertilityOS is built around a modular architecture. The core platform gives you multi-tenant accounts, RBAC, and basic patient management. Add specialist modules as your clinic grows.

patientManagement.name: Patient Management
patientManagement.description: Complete patient profiles, medical history, consents, partner/donor linkage, and document management. The central hub for every patient's journey.

scheduling.name: Scheduling & Appointments
scheduling.description: Multi-provider calendar with drag-and-drop booking, automated SMS/email reminders, waitlist management, and recurring appointment templates.

emr.name: Electronic Medical Records
emr.description: Clinical notes in SOAP format, ICD-10 diagnosis codes, prescription management, referral letters, and a complete audit trail for compliance.

ivfLab.name: IVF Lab & Embryology
ivfLab.description: Full IVF cycle tracking — stimulation protocols, egg retrieval, fertilization rates, embryo grading (Gardner scale), cryopreservation, PGT/PGS results, and chain of custody.

billing.name: Financial Management & Billing
billing.description: Treatment package pricing, invoice generation, payment tracking, insurance claim management, and financial reporting. Integrated with Stripe.

staff.name: Staff & Role Management
staff.description: Onboard doctors, nurses, embryologists, lab technicians, reception, radiologists, and custom staff roles. Granular module-level permissions per role.

donor.name: Donor Management
donor.description: Manage egg and sperm donor profiles, matching workflows, consent documentation, legal compliance tracking, and anonymization controls.

telemedicine.name: Telemedicine
telemedicine.description: HIPAA-compliant video consultations built into the patient record. Schedule, conduct, and document virtual appointments with recordings and notes.

patientPortal.name: Patient Portal
patientPortal.description: A branded, patient-facing portal where patients can view their treatment plan, test results, appointments, invoices, and message their care team securely.

inventory.name: Inventory Management
inventory.description: Track consumables, medications, lab reagents, and equipment. Set low-stock alerts, manage purchase orders, and maintain expiry tracking.

analytics.name: Analytics & Reporting
analytics.description: KPI dashboards, success rate analytics, cycle outcome reports, financial summaries, and custom report builder. Export to PDF or CSV.

compliance.name: Compliance & Audit
compliance.description: Automated audit trails, data access logs, HIPAA and GDPR compliance tools, data retention policies, and regulatory report generation.

formulary.name: Formulary & Prescriptions
formulary.description: Clinic-owned medication database and protocols (e.g. IVF). Prescribe only from formulary or protocol; track dispensed and completed.

icd11.name: ICD-11 Diagnosis
icd11.description: Full WHO ICD-11 for Mortality and Morbidity. Search and assign diagnoses; optional custom diagnosis with role-based controls.

letterheadPrint.name: Letterhead & Print
letterheadPrint.description: Upload letterhead or use templates; set margins and footer. Prescription print with QR code for patient portal access.

mrPrinting.name: MR Labels & Wrist Bands
mrPrinting.description: Print wrist bands, IVF lab barcodes, vial and sample labels, medication envelopes. Zebra, Brother, thermal, and PDF support.

auditLogs.name: Audit Logs
auditLogs.description: Key actions logged for compliance: login, patient create/update, invoice create. Admin view with filters.

surrogacy.name: Surrogacy Cases
surrogacy.description: Track surrogacy cases, intended parents, surrogate details, status and dates. Case number and notes per tenant.

referrals.name: Referral Program
referrals.description: Referral codes and share links; track signups. Apply code at registration for attribution.

apiKeys.name: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Create and manage API keys for integrations. List, revoke, and use keys for external systems.

multiCurrency.name: Multi-Currency
multiCurrency.description: Tenant default currency (USD, EUR, GBP, etc.). Invoices and amounts display in chosen currency.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in
howItWorks.subtitle: FertilityOS is designed for clinical teams, not IT departments. Onboard your clinic in four simple steps.

register.title: Register Your Clinic
register.description: Sign up with your clinic's name, specialty, and contact details. Choose your FertilityOS subdomain or connect your own custom domain for full white-label branding.
details: Choose subdomain or connect your domain

setupTeam.title: Set Up Your Team
setupTeam.description: Create accounts for your entire staff — doctors, nurses, embryologists, lab technicians, reception, and radiologists. Assign precise, role-based permissions for each team member.

enableModules.title: Enable Your Modules
enableModules.description: Activate the modules your clinic needs from the billing dashboard. Core modules are included in every plan. Specialty add-ons can be enabled at any time with a single click.
details: Core modules included in all plans

startCare.title: Start Managing Care
startCare.description: Onboard your patients, schedule appointments, document clinical notes, track IVF cycles, and manage billing — all in one unified, beautifully designed platform.

pricing.title: Simple pricing.
pricing.subtitle: Start with the core platform and add specialty modules as you grow. All plans include a 14-day free trial — no credit card required.
pricing.addonsSubtitle: Enable additional modules for your clinic at any time from your billing dashboard. Each add-on is billed per clinic account.
pricing.enterpriseTitle: Running a multi-location group or enterprise clinic?
pricing.enterpriseSubtitle: Get a custom quote with dedicated infrastructure, premium SLA, custom integrations, and full white-label licensing.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about FertilityOS. Can't find the answer you're looking for?

install.q: Do I need to install anything to use FertilityOS?
install.a: No. FertilityOS is a fully cloud-based SaaS platform. You access it through any modern web browser — no software installation, no IT maintenance required. Updates and new features are deployed automatically.

domain.q: Can I use my own domain name (e.g., portal.myclinic.com)?
domain.a: Yes. On the Growth and Scale plans, you can connect your own domain or subdomain. We provide a simple CNAME setup guide, and Cloudflare handles the domain masking. Your patients will only see your brand.

modules.q: How does the module add-on system work?
modules.a: The core platform (Patient Management, Scheduling, EMR, IVF Lab, Billing, Staff Management) is included in every plan. Additional specialty modules like Telemedicine, Patient Portal, or Donor Management can be enabled at any time from your billing dashboard. Each add-on has a flat monthly fee per clinic account.

hipaa.a: FertilityOS is architected to be HIPAA-compliant. Data is encrypted at rest and in transit, access is role-controlled, and all activity is logged. Business Associate Agreements (BAA) are available on Scale and Enterprise plans.

multiTenant.q: How does multi-tenant data isolation work?
multiTenant.a: Each clinic's data is stored in a logically isolated environment using row-level security and schema separation. Your data is completely inaccessible to other clinics on the platform.

migrate.q: Can I migrate my existing patient data into FertilityOS?
migrate.a: Yes. We support CSV import for patient records and can assist with data migration from common fertility software platforms. Contact our team for enterprise-level migration assistance.

roles.q: What staff roles does FertilityOS support?
roles.a: Admin, Doctor/Fertility Specialist, Embryologist, Nurse, Lab Technician, Reception, Radiologist, and fully customizable Staff roles. Each role can be assigned granular, module-level permissions by your clinic admin.

trial.a: Yes — all plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card is required to start. After the trial, you can choose the plan that fits your clinic.

waitlist.title: Be among the first clinics on
waitlist.subtitle: Join our early access waitlist. Get priority onboarding, 30 days free, and direct input on product features.
waitlist.successMessage: We'll be in touch at {email} with next steps. Thank you for your interest in FertilityOS.
waitlist.trialDataHint: Email and phone are stored so we can offer one 14-day trial per clinic and prevent repeat signups.
waitlist.disclaimer: No credit card required. 14-day free trial. No spam.
